results.rendered_html:
svī—√kṛ (svī-). P. Ā. -karoti, -kurute (the latter older and more correct), to make one's own, win, appropriate, claim,  ŚBr.  &c. &c.;
to take to one's self, choose (with or without bhāryārTe, ‘to take for a wife, marry’; snuṣā-tvena, ‘for a daughter-in-law’),  R. ;  Kathās. ;  Rājat. ;
to win power over (hearts &c.),  Daś. ;  BhP. ;
(Ā.) to admit, assent or agree to, ratify,  Hit. ;  Sarvad.  :
Caus. -kārayati, to cause any one to appropriate, present any one with (two acc.),  Rājat.

results.rendered_html:
svīkṛ 8 U.
1 To make one's own, appropriate, claim.
2 To take, accept.
3 To admit, grant, assume (in argument).
4 To assent or agree to, accede.
